rulings.Case Title: SMART BUILDERS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. JANE MARTIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Continuance Of Hearing On Motion To Invalidate Mechanic'S Lien Of Smart Builders, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 19, 2016 line 1. DEFENDANT JANE MARTIN's Motion To Invalidate Mechanic'S Lien Of Smart Builders, Inc. GRANTED subject to moving party filing and providing a courtesy copy of the CM-181 mandatory form no later than 9:00 a.m. on August 19, 2016. If CM-181 is not on file on or before 9:00 a.m. the motion will be ordered off calendar = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NICHOLAS JARRETT ET AL VS. JUDITH LEWIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Judy Lewis' Notice Of Motion For Reasonable Attorney'S Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 19, 2016 line 2. DEFENDANT JUDITH LEWIS' Motion For Reasonable Attorney'S Fees And Costs GRANTED, Defendant is entitled to recover costs per the Memorandum of Costs, $60 filing fee for the Motion for attorney's fees and attorneys fees in the amount of $4,300. = (501/REQ)
